programs.name: Volley Jrs
programs.description: Skill strengthening and simple game concepts.

uniforms.numbers: Must be clearly visible, centered side to side on front and back. Recommended on upper half. May not extend below waist or be tucked in.
uniforms.colors: Contrast between jersey and number must be clear.

coaching.standing: One coach at a time may stand or walk in the free zone from the attack line extension to the warm-up area.
coaching.assistant_coaches: One assistant coach at a time may stand to give instructions but cannot intervene in the match.

play_rules.scoring: Rally scoring. Sets 1-4 to 25 points, Set 5 to 15 points. Must win by 2.
play_rules.serving_14U: Service tossing error (catching or dropping ball) allows one re-serve within 8 seconds.
play_rules.screening: Players must not prevent opponents from seeing the server or flight path of the ball.
play_rules.protests: Judgment decisions are NOT subject to protest. Protesting a judgment may result in a red card for the coach.

age_definitions.rule: The age group you qualify for is determined by your age on July 1st of the following year (e.g., for the 2026-27 season, your age on July 1, 2027).

tryout_policies.membership_requirement: All participants must have a valid USAV/SRVA membership prior to tryouts.
tryout_policies.commitment: Once an invitation is accepted in SportsEngine (MMS), it is binding for the entire season (starting Sept 1st).
tryout_policies.affiliations: Athletes may only affiliate with one indoor club during the USAV indoor season.
tryout_policies.transfers: Handled according to the SRVA Athlete/Member Transfer Policy.

season_dates.tryout_window_girls: Generally starts after July 4th or completion of BJNC/GJNC.

latest_news.title: Check our Instagram for latest training photos!
